name: torrent_scanner
short_description: Fast utility to index .torrent files and match them against on-disk folders and files with database persistence.
long_description: torrent_scanner is a comprehensive utility for managing torrent metadata and matching it against downloaded data on disk. It provides both a high-level Python API and a command-line interface for indexing .torrent files, finding corresponding downloaded data, and querying torrent information. The system uses BEP-3 compliant bencode parsing with SHA-1 info hash computation, stores metadata in SQLite via Peewee ORM, and employs Redis (via redislite) for fast lookups. It intelligently handles both single-file and multi-file torrents, supports multiple export formats (JSON, JSONL, CSV), and safely skips symlinks while gracefully handling permission errors during filesystem scanning.

modules.description: Package initialization and public API exports including TorrentScanner class, convenience functions, and database models.
High-level public API providing the TorrentScanner class with methods for indexing torrents, finding matches, querying info, and convenience functions for quick operations.
Minimal BEP-3 compliant bencode decoder with offset tracking for extracting torrent file info dictionaries and computing canonical SHA-1 hashes.
Torrent file parsing and metadata extraction implementing BEP-3 format parsing with proper handling of multi-file torrents and file hashing.
Core scanning orchestration logic that indexes torrents into Redis for fast lookups and matches indexed torrents against on-disk data using both name and file-based matching.
Peewee ORM database models for Torrent, TorrentFile, and Match entities with indexes and query functions for efficient database operations.
Filesystem utilities for discovering .torrent files, computing structure hashes for directories, and computing hashes for individual files to enable matching.
Command-line interface with organized command groups including indexing, querying, listing, and database management with support for multiple output formats.
Entry script for running torrent_scanner as a module or executable.
